Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.

Local Open Scope cat.


Setting D constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ⊠ _".


Local Notation "( c , d )" := (make_catbinprod c d).
Local Notation "( f #, g )" := (catbinprodmor f g).

Section TensorFunctorCategory.

  Context {C D : category}
          (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C)
          (TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D).

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  Definition functor_tensor_map_dom (F : functor C D)
    : functor (C ⊠ C) D
    := functor_composite (pair_functor F F) TD.

  Definition functor_tensor_map_codom (F : functor C D)
    : functor (C ⊠ C) D
    := functor_composite TC F.

  Definition functor_tensor (F : functor C D)
    : UU := nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom F) (functor_tensor_map_codom F).
  Identity Coercion functor_tensor_c : functor_tensor >-> nat_trans.

  Definition is_nat_trans_tensor {F G : functor C D}
             (FF : functor_tensor F) (GG : functor_tensor G)
             (α : nat_trans F G) : UU
    := ∏ x y : C, (α x #⊗_D α y) · GG (x, y)
                  = FF (x, y) · α (x ⊗_C y).

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop (is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop (is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α)

    do 2 (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply D.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
is_nat_trans_tensor FF FF (nat_trans_id F)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
is_nat_trans_tensor FF FF (nat_trans_id F)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
x, y: C
# TD (nat_trans_id F x #, nat_trans_id F y)
· FF (x, y) = FF (x, y) · nat_trans_id F (x ⊗_C y)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
x, y: C
# TD (id F x #, id F y) · FF (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · id F (x ⊗_C y)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
x, y: C
id (F x ⊗_D F y) · FF (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · id F (x ⊗_C y)

    exact (id_left _ @ ! id_right _).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
is_nat_trans_tensor FF HH (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
is_nat_trans_tensor FF HH (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD
  (nat_trans_comp F G H α β x
  #, nat_trans_comp F G H α β y) · HH (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · nat_trans_comp F G H α β (x ⊗_C y)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x · β x #, α y · β y) · HH (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · (α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x · β x #, α y · β y) · HH (x, y) = ?b
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
?b = FF (x, y) · (α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y))

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

x, y: C
# TD (α x · β x #, α y · β y) · HH (x, y) = ?b

      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x · β x #, α y · β y) = ?y'

      exact (functor_comp TD (α x #, α y) (β x #, β y)).

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D

HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · # TD (β x #, β y) · HH (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · (α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y))

β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · (# TD (β x #, β y) · HH (x, y)) =
FF (x, y) · (α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y))

# TD (α x #, α y) · (# TD (β x #, β y) · HH (x, y)) =
?b

TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D

α: F ⟹ G

ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β

C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (β x #, β y) · HH (x, y) = ?t2

      exact (ββ x y).
    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · (GG (x, y) · β (x ⊗_C y)) =
FF (x, y) · (α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · GG (x, y) · β (x ⊗_C y) =
FF (x, y) · α (x ⊗_C y) · β (x ⊗_C y)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor F
GG: functor_tensor G
HH: functor_tensor H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_tensor GG HH β
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · GG (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · α (x ⊗_C y)

    apply αα.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_ob_mor [C, D]

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_ob_mor [C, D]

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
∏ x y : [C, D],
functor_tensor x
→ functor_tensor y → [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    exact (λ F G FF GG α, is_nat_trans_tensor FF GG α).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_id_comp [C, D] functor_tensor_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_id_comp [C, D] functor_tensor_disp_cat_ob_mor

    split ; intro ; intros ; [apply is_nat_trans_tensor_id | use is_nat_trans_tensor_comp ; assumption ].
  Qed.

  Definition functor_tensor_disp_cat_data
    : disp_cat_data [C,D]
    := _ ,, functor_tensor_disp_cat_id_comp.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_axioms [C, D] functor_tensor_disp_cat_data

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
disp_cat_axioms [C, D] functor_tensor_disp_cat_data

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
x, y: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: functor_tensor_disp_cat_data x
yy: functor_tensor_disp_cat_data y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
x, y: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: functor_tensor_disp_cat_data x
yy: functor_tensor_disp_cat_data y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

    apply isaprop_is_nat_trans_tensor.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_tensor_disp_cat : disp_cat [C,D]
    := _ ,, functor_tensor_disp_cat_axioms.

  Definition functor_tensor_cat : category
    := total_category functor_tensor_disp_cat.

End TensorFunctorCategory.

Section TensorFunctorCategoryUnivalence.

  Context {C D : category}
          (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C)
          (TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D).

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
isaset (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
isaset (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
has_homsets D

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: C ⟶ D
has_homsets D
 apply D. }
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
is_univalent_disp (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
is_univalent_disp (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
is_univalent_in_fibers (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isweq (λ e : pt1 = pt2, Isos.idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2 → pt1 = pt2
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isaprop (pt1 = pt2)
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isaprop (Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2 → pt1 = pt2
 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
pt1 = pt2

      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
pr1 pt1 = pr1 pt2
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
transportf
  (is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
     (functor_tensor_map_codom TC F)) ?p (pr2 pt1) =
pr2 pt2

      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
pr1 pt1 = pr1 pt2
 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix:= pr1 i (pr1 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  (identity_z_iso F (pr1 x)
  #, identity_z_iso F (pr2 x))
· pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
· identity_z_iso F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix:= pr1 i (pr1 x) (pr2 x): # TD (id pr1 F (pr1 x) #, id pr1 F (pr2 x))
· pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x) · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix: # TD (id (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)))
· pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x) · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix: id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
· pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x) · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix: id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
· pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) = pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x: C ⊠ C
ix: pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) = pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
pr1 pt1 x = pr1 pt2 x

        exact (! ix).
      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
transportf
  (is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
     (functor_tensor_map_codom TC F))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C ⊠ C,
      D ⟦ functor_tensor_map_dom TD F t,
      functor_tensor_map_codom TC F t ⟧) (pr1 pt1)
     (pr1 pt2)
     ((λ x : C ⊠ C,
       let ix := pr1 i (pr1 x) (pr2 x) in
       let ix0 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (D ⊠ D ⟦ (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
            (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧)
           (id pr1 F (pr1 x) #, id pr1 F (pr2 x))
           (λ p : D ⊠ D
                  ⟦ (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                  (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧,
            # TD p · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
            pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
            · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))) ix
           (id (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)))
           (binprod_id (pr1 F (pr1 x)) (pr1 F (pr2 x)))
         in
       let ix1 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (D ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
            TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧)
           (# TD (id (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))))
           (λ p : D
                  ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                  TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧,
            p · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
            pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
            · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))) ix0
           (id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)))
           (functor_id TD
              (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))) in
       let ix2 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (D ⟦ TD (F (pr1 x), F (pr2 x)),
            pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧)
           (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
            · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ TD (F (pr1 x), F (pr2 x)),
                  pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧,
            id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
            · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) = p) ix1
           (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
           (id_right (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x))) in
       let ix3 :=
         internal_paths_rew
           (D ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
            F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧)
           (id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
            · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
           (λ p : D
                  ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                  F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧,
            p = pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ix2
           (pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
           (id_left (pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))) in
       ! ix3)
      :
      pr1 pt1 ~ pr1 pt2)) (pr2 pt1) = pr2 pt2
 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x, x0: C ⊠ C
transportf
  (is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
     (functor_tensor_map_codom TC F))
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C ⊠ C,
      D ⟦ functor_tensor_map_dom TD F t,
      functor_tensor_map_codom TC F t ⟧) (pr1 pt1)
     (pr1 pt2)
     (λ x : C ⊠ C,
      let ix := pr1 i (pr1 x) (pr2 x) in
      let ix0 :=
        internal_paths_rew
          (D ⊠ D ⟦ (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
           (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧)
          (id pr1 F (pr1 x) #, id pr1 F (pr2 x))
          (λ p : D ⊠ D
                 ⟦ (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                 (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧,
           # TD p · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
           pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
           · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))) ix
          (id (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)))
          (binprod_id (pr1 F (pr1 x)) (pr1 F (pr2 x)))
        in
      let ix1 :=
        internal_paths_rew
          (D ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
           TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧)
          (# TD (id (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))))
          (λ p : D
                 ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                 TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)) ⟧,
           p · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) =
           pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
           · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x))) ix0
          (id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)))
          (functor_id TD
             (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))) in
      let ix2 :=
        internal_paths_rew
          (D ⟦ TD (F (pr1 x), F (pr2 x)),
           pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧)
          (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)
           · id pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)))
          (λ p : D ⟦ TD (F (pr1 x), F (pr2 x)),
                 pr1 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧,
           id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
           · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x) = p) ix1
          (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
          (id_right (pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x))) in
      let ix3 :=
        internal_paths_rew
          (D ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
           F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧)
          (id TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x))
           · pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
          (λ p : D
                 ⟦ TD (pr1 F (pr1 x), pr1 F (pr2 x)),
                 F (TC (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ⟧,
           p = pt1 (pr1 x, pr2 x)) ix2
          (pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))
          (id_left (pt2 (pr1 x, pr2 x))) in
      ! ix3)) (pr2 pt1) x x0 = pr2 pt2 x x0

        
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
x, x0: C ⊠ C
t: C ⊠ C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
isaprop
  (# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) t · pr1 pt2 x0 =
   pr1 pt2 x · # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC F) t)

        apply D.
    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isaprop (pt1 = pt2)
 apply isaset_functor_tensor_disp_cat.
    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isaprop (Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2)
 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isPredicate (Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
∏ x y : pt1 -->[ identity_z_iso F] pt2,
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y

      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
isPredicate (Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
 intro ; apply Isos.isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
      
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
∏ x y : pt1 -->[ identity_z_iso F] pt2,
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y
 do 4 intro ; apply isaprop_is_nat_trans_tensor.
  Qed.

End TensorFunctorCategoryUnivalence.

Section TensorFunctorProperties.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G))
  (λ cc : C × C,
   GG (F (pr1 cc), F (pr2 cc)) · # G (FF cc))

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G))
  (λ cc : C × C,
   GG (F (pr1 cc), F (pr2 cc)) · # G (FF cc))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G)) f
· (GG (F (pr1 cc2), F (pr2 cc2)) · # G (FF cc2)) =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1)) · # G (FF cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G)) f
· (GG (F (pr1 cc2), F (pr2 cc2)) · # G (FF cc2)) = 
?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1)) · # G (FF cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G)) f
· (GG (F (pr1 cc2), F (pr2 cc2)) · # G (FF cc2)) = 
?b

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G)) f
· GG (F (pr1 cc2), F (pr2 cc2)) · # G (FF cc2) = ?b

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G)) f
· GG (F (pr1 cc2), F (pr2 cc2)) = ?y'

      exact (pr2 GG ((pair_functor F F) cc1) (pair_functor F F cc2) (# (pair_functor F F) f)).
    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
pr1 GG (pair_functor F F cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (# (pair_functor F F) f) · # G (FF cc2) =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1)) · # G (FF cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f


    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
pr1 GG (pair_functor F F cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (# (pair_functor F F) f) · # G (FF cc2) = ?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1)) · # G (FF cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1)) · # G (FF cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1))
· (# G (FF cc1)
   · # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G)) f)

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1))
· (# G (FF cc1) · # G (# F (# TC f)))

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?b =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1))
· # G (FF cc1 · # F (# TC f))

      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
?t1 = FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)

      exact (pr2 FF cc1 cc2 f).
    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
pr1 GG (pair_functor F F cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (# (pair_functor F F) f) · # G (FF cc2) =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1))
· # G (# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) f · pr1 FF cc2)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
pr1 GG (pair_functor F F cc1)
· (# (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
     (# (pair_functor F F) f) · # G (FF cc2)) =
GG (F (pr1 cc1), F (pr2 cc1))
· # G (# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) f · pr1 FF cc2)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
f: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
  (# (pair_functor F F) f) · # G (FF cc2) =
# G (# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) f · pr1 FF cc2)

    apply (! functor_comp G _ _).
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
functor_tensor TC TE (F ∙ G)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
functor_tensor TC TE (F ∙ G)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TD TE G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TE (F ∙ G))
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC (F ∙ G))
  (λ cc : ∑ _ : C, C,
   GG (F (pr1 cc), F (pr2 cc)) · # G (FF cc))

    apply functor_tensor_composition_is_nat_trans.
  Defined.

  (* A characterization of the tensor property of monoidal natural transformations
     in terms of equality/isos of functors/natural transformations. *)
  Context {C D E : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C}
          {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}.

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  Context {F G : functor C D}
          (FF : functor_tensor TC TD F) (GG : functor_tensor TC TD G)
          (α : nat_trans F G).

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
  (λ cc : C × C,
   # TD (α (pr1 cc) #, α (pr2 cc)) · GG cc)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
  (λ cc : C × C,
   # TD (α (pr1 cc) #, α (pr2 cc)) · GG cc)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) ff
· (# TD (α (pr1 cc2) #, α (pr2 cc2)) · GG cc2) =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G) ff

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
· (# TD (α (pr1 cc2) #, α (pr2 cc2)) · GG cc2) =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
· # TD (α (pr1 cc2) #, α (pr2 cc2)) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD
  ((# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
   · (α (pr1 cc2) #, α (pr2 cc2))) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD
  (# F (pr1 ff) · α (pr1 cc2)
  #, # F (pr2 ff) · α (pr2 cc2)) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD
  (pr1 α (pr1 cc1) · # G (pr1 ff)
  #, pr1 α (pr2 cc1) · # G (pr2 ff)) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD
  ((pr1 α (pr1 cc1) #, pr1 α (pr2 cc1))
   · (# G (pr1 ff) #, # G (pr2 ff))) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (pr1 α (pr1 cc1) #, pr1 α (pr2 cc1))
· # TD (# G (pr1 ff) #, # G (pr2 ff)) · GG cc2 =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1)) · GG cc1
· # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (pr1 α (pr1 cc1) #, pr1 α (pr2 cc1))
· (# TD (# G (pr1 ff) #, # G (pr2 ff)) · GG cc2) =
# TD (α (pr1 cc1) #, α (pr2 cc1))
· (GG cc1 · # G (# TC ff))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (# G (pr1 ff) #, # G (pr2 ff)) · GG cc2 =
GG cc1 · # G (# TC ff)

    apply (pr2 GG).
  Qed.

  Definition nat_trans_tensor_ntrans1
    : nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
    := _ ,, nat_trans_tensor_ntrans1_is_nat_trans.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
  (λ cc : C × C, FF cc · α (pr1 cc ⊗_C pr2 cc))

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
is_nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)
  (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
  (λ cc : C × C, FF cc · α (pr1 cc ⊗_C pr2 cc))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) ff
· (FF cc2 · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2)) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G) ff

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
· (FF cc2 · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2)) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧,
# (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) f · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # (functor_tensor_map_codom TC F) f
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
· (FF cc2 · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2)) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C cc1 cc2,
# TD (# F (pr1 f) #, # F (pr2 f)) · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff))
· (FF cc2 · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2)) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C cc1 cc2,
# TD (# F (pr1 f) #, # F (pr2 f)) · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)
# TD (# F (pr1 ff) #, # F (pr2 ff)) · FF cc2
· α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C cc1 cc2,
# TD (# F (pr1 f) #, # F (pr2 f)) · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC ff) · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2) =
FF cc1 · α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C cc1 cc2,
# TD (# F (pr1 f) #, # F (pr2 f)) · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)
pr1 FF cc1 · (# F (# TC ff) · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2)) =
FF cc1 · (α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
cc1, cc2: C ⊠ C
ff: C ⊠ C ⟦ cc1, cc2 ⟧
t:= pr2 FF cc1 cc2: ∏ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C cc1 cc2,
# TD (# F (pr1 f) #, # F (pr2 f)) · pr1 FF cc2 =
pr1 FF cc1 · # F (# TC f)
# F (# TC ff) · α (pr1 cc2 ⊗_C pr2 cc2) =
α (pr1 cc1 ⊗_C pr2 cc1) · # G (# TC ff)

    apply (pr2 α).
  Qed.

  Definition nat_trans_tensor_ntrans2
    : nat_trans (functor_tensor_map_dom TD F) (functor_tensor_map_codom TC G)
    := _ ,, nat_trans_tensor_ntrans2_is_nat_trans.

  Definition is_nat_trans_tensor' : UU
    := nat_trans_tensor_ntrans1 = nat_trans_tensor_ntrans2.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor'
is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor'
is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor'
x, y: C
# TD (α x #, α y) · GG (x, y) =
FF (x, y) · α (x ⊗_C y)

    exact (eqtohomot (base_paths _ _ p) (x,y)).
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
is_nat_trans_tensor'

TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
is_nat_trans_tensor'

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
has_homsets D

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
∏ x : C ⊠ C,
nat_trans_tensor_ntrans1 x =
nat_trans_tensor_ntrans2 x

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
has_homsets D
 apply D. 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
F, G: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
GG: functor_tensor TC TD G
α: F ⟹ G
p: is_nat_trans_tensor TC TD FF GG α
∏ x : C ⊠ C,
nat_trans_tensor_ntrans1 x =
nat_trans_tensor_ntrans2 x

    exact (λ cc, p (pr1 cc) (pr2 cc)).
  Qed.

End TensorFunctorProperties.

Section UnitFunctorCategory.

  Context {C D : category} (IC : C) (ID : D).

  Definition functor_unit (F : functor C D) : UU
    := D⟦ID, pr1 F IC⟧.

  Definition is_nat_trans_unit
             {F G : functor C D} (FF : functor_unit F) (GG : functor_unit G)
             (α : nat_trans F G) : UU
    := FF · α IC = GG.

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_ob_mor [C, D]

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_ob_mor [C, D]

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
∏ x y : [C, D],
functor_unit x → functor_unit y → [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    exact (λ F G FF GG α, is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
is_nat_trans_unit FF FF (nat_trans_id F)

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
is_nat_trans_unit FF FF (nat_trans_id F)

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
is_nat_trans_unit FF HH (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
is_nat_trans_unit FF HH (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
FF · nat_trans_comp F G H α β IC = ?b
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
?b = HH
 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
FF · nat_trans_comp F G H α β IC = ?b
 apply assoc. 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
FF · α IC · β IC = HH

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
FF · α IC · β IC = ?b
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
?b = HH
 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
FF · α IC · β IC = ?b
 apply maponpaths_2 ; exact αα. 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_unit F
GG: functor_unit G
HH: functor_unit H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
αα: is_nat_trans_unit FF GG α
ββ: is_nat_trans_unit GG HH β
GG · β IC = HH

    exact ββ.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_id_comp [C, D] functor_unit_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_id_comp [C, D] functor_unit_disp_cat_ob_mor

    split ; intro ; intros ; [apply is_nat_trans_unit_id | use is_nat_trans_unit_comp ; assumption ].
  Qed.

  Definition functor_unit_disp_cat_data
    : disp_cat_data [C,D]
    := _ ,, functor_unit_disp_cat_id_comp.

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_axioms [C, D] functor_unit_disp_cat_data

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
disp_cat_axioms [C, D] functor_unit_disp_cat_data

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
x, y: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: functor_unit_disp_cat_data x
yy: functor_unit_disp_cat_data y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
x, y: [C, D]
f: [C, D] ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: functor_unit_disp_cat_data x
yy: functor_unit_disp_cat_data y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

    apply D.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_unit_disp_cat : disp_cat [C,D]
    := _ ,, functor_unit_disp_cat_axioms.

  Definition functor_unit_cat : category
    := total_category functor_unit_disp_cat.

End UnitFunctorCategory.

Section UnitFunctorCategoryUnivalence.

  Context {C D : category} (IC : C) (ID : D).

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID)

  
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_in_fibers (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isweq (λ e : pt1 = pt2, Isos.idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2 → pt1 = pt2
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isaprop (pt1 = pt2)
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isaprop (Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2)

    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2 → pt1 = pt2
 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
pt1 = pt2

      
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
i: Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2
pt1 = pt1 · identity_z_iso F IC

      apply (! id_right _).
    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isaprop (pt1 = pt2)
 apply D.
    
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isaprop (Isos.z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) pt1 pt2)
 
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isPredicate (Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
∏ x y : pt1 -->[ identity_z_iso F] pt2,
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y

      
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
isPredicate (Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F))
 intro ; apply Isos.isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
      
C, D: category
IC: C
ID: D
F: [C, D]
pt1, pt2: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
∏ x y : pt1 -->[ identity_z_iso F] pt2,
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) x
→ Isos.is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso F) y → x = y
 do 4 intro ; apply D.
  Qed.

End UnitFunctorCategoryUnivalence.

Section UnitFunctorProperties.

  Definition functor_unit_composition
             {C D E : category}
             {IC : C} {ID : D} {IE : E}
             {F : functor C D} {G : functor D E}
             (FF : functor_unit IC ID F) (GG : functor_unit ID IE G)
    : functor_unit IC IE (functor_composite F G)
    := GG · #G FF.

End UnitFunctorProperties.


Section FunctorTensorUnit.

  Context {C D : category}
          (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C) (TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D)
          (IC : C) (ID : D).

  Definition functor_tensorunit_disp_cat
    : disp_cat [C,D]
    := dirprod_disp_cat (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD) (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID).

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp functor_tensorunit_disp_cat

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp functor_tensorunit_disp_cat

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD)
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD)
 apply functor_tensor_disp_cat_is_univalent.
    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
is_univalent_disp (functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID)
 apply functor_unit_disp_cat_is_univalent.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_tensorunit_cat
    : category := total_category functor_tensorunit_disp_cat.

End FunctorTensorUnit.

Section TensorUnitFunctorProperties.

  Context {C D E : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}
          {TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E}
          {IC : C} {ID : D} {IE : E}.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TE IC IE (F ∙ G)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TE IC IE (F ∙ G)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
functor_unit_disp_cat IC IE (F ∙ G)

    exact (functor_unit_composition (pr2 FF) (pr2 GG)).
  Defined.

End TensorUnitFunctorProperties.

Section MonoidalFunctorCategory.

  Context {C D : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}
          {IC : C} {ID : D}
          (luC : left_unitor TC IC) (luD : left_unitor TD ID)
          (ruC : right_unitor TC IC) (ruD : right_unitor TD ID)
          (αC : associator TC) (αD : associator TD).

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
disp_cat (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
disp_cat (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID → UU

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: [C, D]
FT: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
FU: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
UU

    exact (∏ x : C, luD (pr1 F x) = FU #⊗_D (id (pr1 F x)) · (pr1 FT) (IC, x) · #(pr1 F) (luC x)).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D

luD: left_unitor TD ID

ID: D

ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID → UU

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: [C, D]
FT: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
FU: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
UU

    exact (∏ x : C, ruD (pr1 F x) =  (id (pr1 F x)) #⊗_D FU · (pr1 FT) (x, IC) · #(pr1 F) (ruC x)).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID

TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID → UU

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: [C, D]
FT: functor_tensor_disp_cat TC TD F
FU: functor_unit_disp_cat IC ID F
UU


    exact (∏ (x y z : C),
            pr1 FT (x, y) #⊗_D id (pr1 F(z)) · pr1 FT (x ⊗_C y, z) · #(pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z))
            =
              αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z) · id (pr1 F x) #⊗_D pr1 FT (y, z) · pr1 FT (x, y ⊗_C z)).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
is_univalent_disp functor_lu_disp_cat

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC

C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
∏ x : functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID,
isaprop
  (∏ x0 : C,
   luD ((pr11 x) x0) =
   # TD (pr22 x #, id (pr11 x) x0)
   · (pr112 x) (IC, x0) · # (pr11 x) (luC x0))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
x: functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID
isaprop
  (∏ x0 : C,
   luD ((pr11 x) x0) =
   # TD (pr22 x #, id (pr11 x) x0)
   · (pr112 x) (IC, x0) · # (pr11 x) (luC x0))

    apply impred_isaprop ; intro ; apply D.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
is_univalent_disp functor_ru_disp_cat

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D

luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
is_univalent_disp functor_ru_disp_cat

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
∏ x : functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID,
isaprop
  (∏ x0 : C,
   ruD ((pr11 x) x0) =
   # TD (id (pr11 x) x0 #, pr22 x)
   · (pr112 x) (x0, IC) · # (pr11 x) (ruC x0))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
x: functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID
isaprop
  (∏ x0 : C,
   ruD ((pr11 x) x0) =
   # TD (id (pr11 x) x0 #, pr22 x)
   · (pr112 x) (x0, IC) · # (pr11 x) (ruC x0))

    apply impred_isaprop ; intro ; apply D.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
is_univalent_disp functor_ass_disp_cat

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
is_univalent_disp functor_ass_disp_cat

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
∏ x : functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID,
isaprop
  (∏ x0 y z : C,
   # TD ((pr112 x) (x0, y) #, id (pr11 x) z)
   · (pr112 x) (x0 ⊗_C y, z)
   · # (pr11 x) (αC ((x0, y), z)) =
   αD (((pr11 x) x0, (pr11 x) y), (pr11 x) z)
   · # TD (id (pr11 x) x0 #, (pr112 x) (y, z))
   · (pr112 x) (x0, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
x: functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID
isaprop
  (∏ x0 y z : C,
   # TD ((pr112 x) (x0, y) #, id (pr11 x) z)
   · (pr112 x) (x0 ⊗_C y, z)
   · # (pr11 x) (αC ((x0, y), z)) =
   αD (((pr11 x) x0, (pr11 x) y), (pr11 x) z)
   · # TD (id (pr11 x) x0 #, (pr112 x) (y, z))
   · (pr112 x) (x0, y ⊗_C z))

    do 3 (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply D.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_monoidal_disp_cat
    : disp_cat (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TD IC ID)
    := dirprod_disp_cat
         (dirprod_disp_cat functor_lu_disp_cat functor_ru_disp_cat)
         functor_ass_disp_cat.

  Definition functor_monoidal_cat
    : category
    := total_category functor_monoidal_disp_cat.

End MonoidalFunctorCategory.

Section StrongMonoidalFunctorCategory.

  Context {C D : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}
          {IC : C} {ID : D}
          (luC : left_unitor TC IC) (luD : left_unitor TD ID)
          (ruC : right_unitor TC IC) (ruD : right_unitor TD ID)
          (αC : associator TC) (αD : associator TD).

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  Definition functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat
    : disp_cat (functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD)
    := disp_full_sub (functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD)
                     (λ F,
                       is_nat_z_iso (pr121 F : nat_trans _ _)
                                    × is_z_isomorphism (pr221 F)).

  Definition strong_functor_monoidal_cat
    : category
    := total_category functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat.

End StrongMonoidalFunctorCategory.

Definition LaxMonoidalFunctorCat
           (M N : monoidal_cat)
  : category
  := functor_monoidal_cat
       (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M)
       (monoidal_cat_left_unitor N)
       (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M)
       (monoidal_cat_right_unitor N)
       (monoidal_cat_associator M)
       (monoidal_cat_associator N).

Definition StrongMonoidalFunctorCat
           (M N : monoidal_cat)
  : category
  := strong_functor_monoidal_cat
       (monoidal_cat_left_unitor M)
       (monoidal_cat_left_unitor N)
       (monoidal_cat_right_unitor M)
       (monoidal_cat_right_unitor N)
       (monoidal_cat_associator M)
       (monoidal_cat_associator N).

Section FunctorMonoidalProperties.

  Context {C D E : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}
          {TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E}
          {IC : C} {ID : D} {IE : E}.

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_E Y" := (TE (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_E g" := (# TE (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
functor_lu_disp_cat luC luE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
functor_lu_disp_cat luC luE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
luE (pr1 (F ∙ G) x) =
# TE
  (pr2 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)
  #, id pr1 (F ∙ G) x)
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (IC, x) · # (pr1 (F ∙ G)) (luC x)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (pr11 GG) (ID, F x)
· # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE
  (pr2 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)
  #, id pr1 (F ∙ G) x)
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (IC, x) · # (pr1 (F ∙ G)) (luC x)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (pr11 GG) (ID, F x)
· # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE
  (functor_unit_composition (pr2 FF) (pr2 GG)
  #, id G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x) · # G (pr1 FF (IC, x)))
· # G (# F (luC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (pr11 GG) (ID, F x)
· # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x) · # G (pr1 FF (IC, x)))
· # G (# F (luC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x)) =
(pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux: (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x)) =
(pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (pr11 GG) (ID, F x)
· # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x) · # G (pr1 FF (IC, x)))
· # G (# F (luC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x)) =
(pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x)) =
make_dirprod (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF))
  (id pr1 G (F x) · id pr1 G (F x))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E

luE: left_unitor TE IE

G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x)) =
make_dirprod (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) (id pr1 G (F x))
 apply idpath.

# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (pr11 GG) (ID, F x)

?b =
# TE (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))

(pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x)) · (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
?f =
# TE
  ((pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x))
   · (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x)))

         apply pathsinv0, functor_comp.

x: C

· # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =

GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x))
· ((pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x))) =
# TE (pr2 GG #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (# TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
   · (pr1 GG (F IC, F x)
      · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x)))))

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E

luE: left_unitor TE IE

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # (functor_tensor_map_dom TE G)
  (pr2 FF,, id F x) · pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (pr2 FF,, id F x)
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))))

FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, # G (id F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))))

x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id pr1 G (F x))
· (pr1 GG (F IC, F x)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))))

· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) = ?b

(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x) · # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
· # G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
(pr11 GG) (ID, F x) · # (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· (# G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
   · (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x))))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
# (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
· (# G (pr1 FF (IC, x)) · # G (# F (luC x)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
# (pr1 G) (luD (F x)) =
# G
  (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x)
   · (pr1 FF (IC, x) · # F (luC x)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
luD (F x) =
# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x)
· (pr1 FF (IC, x) · # F (luC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_lu_disp_cat luC luD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (pr2 FF) #, id G (F x))
· pr1 GG (F IC,, F x) =
pr1 GG (ID,, F x)
· # G (# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x))
luD (F x) =
# TD (pr2 FF,, id F x) · pr1 FF (IC, x) · # F (luC x)

    apply (FFF x).
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
ruE (pr1 (F ∙ G) x) =
# TE
  (id pr1 (F ∙ G) x
  #, pr2 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (x, IC) · # (pr1 (F ∙ G)) (ruC x)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE
  (id pr1 (F ∙ G) x
  #, pr2 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (x, IC) · # (pr1 (F ∙ G)) (ruC x)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE
  (id G (F x)
  #, functor_unit_composition (pr2 FF) (pr2 GG))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC) · # G (pr1 FF (x, IC)))
· # G (# F (ruC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

ID: D

FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC) · # G (pr1 FF (x, IC)))
· # G (# F (ruC x))

x: C
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) =
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) =
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC) · # G (pr1 FF (x, IC)))
· # G (# F (ruC x))

x: C
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) =
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) =
make_dirprod (id G (F x) · id G (F x))
  (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF))

x: C
(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF)) =
make_dirprod (id G (F x)) (pr2 GG · # G (pr2 FF))
 apply idpath.

(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)

# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

?f =
# TE
  ((id G (F x) #, pr2 GG)
   · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF)))

         apply pathsinv0, functor_comp.

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

(id G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =

C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG) · (pr11 GG) (F x, ID)
· # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, pr2 GG)
· # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC) · # G (pr1 FF (x, IC)))
· # G (# F (ruC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
# TE (id pr1 G (F x) #, pr2 GG)
· ((pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x))) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, pr2 GG)
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
   · (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
      · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x)))))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # (functor_tensor_map_dom TE G)
  (id F x,, pr2 FF) · pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (id F x,, pr2 FF)
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x))))

ID: D

ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (# G (id F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x))))

GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x))))

x: C

· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) = ?b

x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
?b =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F IC)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x))))

x: C

x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
?f =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF)) · pr1 GG (F x, F IC)

         exact (! aux1).

· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =

· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
(pr11 GG) (F x, ID) · # (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =

x: C

· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =

· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
# (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =

· (# G (pr1 FF (x, IC)) · # G (# F (ruC x)))

ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
# (pr1 G) (ruD (F x)) =
# G
  (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF)
   · (pr1 FF (x, IC) · # F (ruC x)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E

ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE

G: D ⟶ E
