GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
ruD (F x) =
# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF)
· (pr1 FF (x, IC) · # F (ruC x))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ruD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE (G,, GG)
x: C
aux1: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G (pr2 FF))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F IC) =
pr1 GG (F x,, ID)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF))
ruD (F x) =
# TD (id F x,, pr2 FF) · pr1 FF (x, IC) · # F (ruC x)

    apply (FFF x).
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
functor_ass_disp_cat αC αE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
functor_ass_disp_cat αC αE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE
  ((pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
     (x, y) #, id pr1 (F ∙ G) z)
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 (F ∙ G)) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αE ((pr1 (F ∙ G) x, pr1 (F ∙ G) y), pr1 (F ∙ G) z)
· # TE
    (id pr1 (F ∙ G) x
    #, (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
         (y, z))
· (pr11 (functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG))
    (x, y ⊗_C z)
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
(id G (F x)
#, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
· (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
(id G (F x)
#, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
· (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
(id G (F x)
#, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
make_dirprod (id G (F x) · id G (F x))
  ((pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
(id G (F x)
#, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
make_dirprod (id G (F x))
  ((pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
 apply idpath. 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?b =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?b =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?f =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE
    (id G (F x)
    #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))

?t1 =

  #, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))

?t10 =
(id G (F x)
#, pr1 GG (F y, F z) · # G (pr1 FF (y, z)))

              exact (! aux). 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?t1 =
# TE
  ((id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))

         apply pathsinv0, functor_comp.
    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux: (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z) · # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))) =
(id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z)) · (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # (functor_tensor_map_dom TE G)
  (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG
  (F x,, functor_tensor_map_dom TD F (y, z))
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (# G (id F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

αE: associator TE

GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)

auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) = ?b

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

αE: associator TE

GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)

auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?b =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))
· (pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))

   · # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z))))

· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))

C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

IC: C
ID: D

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?f =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· # TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
· # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))

         
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?f =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (# TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
      · pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
?t1 =
# TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x, F (y ⊗_C z))

         apply pathsinv0, auxnat. 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat: # TE (id G (F x) #, # G ((pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· pr1 GG (F x,, F (y ⊗_C z)) =
pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
      · # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
      · # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
GGGinst: # TE
  ((pr112 (G,, GG)) (F x, F y)
  #, id (pr11 (G,, GG)) (F z))
· (pr112 (G,, GG)) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr11 (G,, GG)) (αD ((F x, F y), F z)) =
αE
  (((pr11 (G,, GG)) (F x),
   (pr11 (G,, GG)) (F y)),
  (pr11 (G,, GG)) (F z))
· # TE
    (id (pr11 (G,, GG)) (F x)
    #, (pr112 (G,, GG)) (F y, F z))
· (pr112 (G,, GG)) (F x, F y ⊗_D F z)
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
      · # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
GGGinst: # TE
  ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z)) =
αE ((pr1 G (F x), pr1 G (F y)), pr1 G (F z))
· # TE
    (id pr1 G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x, F y ⊗_D F z)
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
αE ((G (F x), G (F y)), G (F z))
· (# TE (id G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
   · (pr1 GG (F x,, F y ⊗_D F z)
      · # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

GGGinst: # TE
  ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z)) =
αE ((pr1 G (F x), pr1 G (F y)), pr1 G (F z))
· # TE
    (id pr1 G (F x) #, (pr11 GG) (F y, F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x, F y ⊗_D F z)
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) = ?b

x, y, z: C
GGGinst: # TE
  ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z)) =

· # TE

· (pr11 GG) (F x, F y ⊗_D F z)
# TE

  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =

· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))

· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

ID: D

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE

GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

αE: associator TE

FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
make_dirprod
  ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)))
  (id G (F z) · id G (F z))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
make_dirprod
  ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)))
  (id G (F z))
 apply idpath. 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
?b =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

#, id G (F z)) =

· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE
  (pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
  #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) = ?b

#, id G (F z)) =

· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))

· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))

C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
(pr1 GG (F x, F y) · # G (pr1 FF (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) = ?t2

        exact aux'. 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE
  (((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
   · (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))) = ?f'

      apply functor_comp.
    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
aux': ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) · # G ((pr11 FF) (x, y))
#, id G (F z)) =
((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · # G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z)))
· # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· (pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· # G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
· # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id G (F z))
· (# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
   · (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
      · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
         · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z)))))) =
# TE ((pr11 GG) (F x, F y) #, id pr1 G (F z))
· ((pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
   · (# (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
      · (# G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
         · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· (# (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
   · (# G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
      · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?b =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· (# (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
   · (# G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
      · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?b =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· (# (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
   · (# G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
      · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))))
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?t1 =
# (pr1 G) (αD ((F x, F y), F z))
· (# G (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z)))
   · # G (pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

         
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?t1 =
# G
  (αD ((F x, F y), F z)
   · (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
      · pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)))

         
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?t1 =
αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (# TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
   · pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z))

         
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
?t1 =
αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· # TD (id F x,, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· pr1 FF (x, y ⊗_C z)

         apply (FFF x y z).
    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # (functor_tensor_map_dom TE G)
  ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z)
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # (functor_tensor_map_codom TD G)
    ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z)
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE
  (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, # G (id F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
?b =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· (pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) = ?b
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z)
· (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
   · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z)))) = ?b
 
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
# TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y), F z) = ?f'

      exact auxnat'.

TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E

ID: D

x, y, z: C
auxnat': # TE (# G ((pr11 FF) (x, y)) #, id G (F z))
· pr1 GG (F (x ⊗_C y),, F z) =
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
· (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
   · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z)))) =

· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D

αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE

G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· # G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
· (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
   · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z)))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
     · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
pr1 GG (F x ⊗_D F y,, F z)
· (# G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
   · (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
      · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z))))) =
(pr11 GG) (F x ⊗_D F y, F z)
· # G
    (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
     · ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
        · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# G (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z))
· (# G (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z))
   · # G (# F (αC ((x, y), z)))) =
# G
  (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
   · ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
      · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z))))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_ass_disp_cat αD αE (G,, GG)
x, y, z: C
# G
  (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y),, id F z)
   · (pr1 FF (x ⊗_C y, z) · # F (αC ((x, y), z)))) =
# G
  (# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
   · ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
      · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z))))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE (G,, GG)
functor_monoidal_disp_cat luC luE ruC ruE αC αE
  (F ∙ G,, functor_tensorunit_composition FF GG)

ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
GG: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TD TE ID IE G
FFF: functor_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD (F,, FF)
GGG: functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE (G,, GG)
right_unitor TD ID

ID: D
IE: E

luE: left_unitor TE IE

ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC

αE: associator TE

GGG: functor_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE (G,, GG)
functor_ru_disp_cat ruC ?ruD (F,, FF)

      exact (pr2 GGG).

End FunctorMonoidalProperties.

Section AssociatorMonoidalProperty.

  
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
pair_functor F1 F2 ⟹ pair_functor G1 G2

  
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
pair_functor F1 F2 ⟹ pair_functor G1 G2

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
nat_trans_data (pair_functor F1 F2)
  (pair_functor G1 G2)
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
is_nat_trans (pair_functor F1 F2) (pair_functor G1 G2)
  ?t

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
nat_trans_data (pair_functor F1 F2)
  (pair_functor G1 G2)
 
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⊠ D2 ⟦ pair_functor F1 F2 x, pair_functor G1 G2 x ⟧

      
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⟦ F1 (pr1 x), G1 (pr1 x) ⟧
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D2 ⟦ F2 (pr2 x), G2 (pr2 x) ⟧

      
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⟦ F1 (pr1 x), G1 (pr1 x) ⟧
 exact (α (pr1 x)).
      
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D2 ⟦ F2 (pr2 x), G2 (pr2 x) ⟧
 exact (β (pr2 x)).
    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: F1 ⟹ G1
β: F2 ⟹ G2
is_nat_trans (pair_functor F1 F2) (pair_functor G1 G2)
  ((λ x : C1 ⊠ C2, (α (pr1 x) #, β (pr2 x)))
   :
   nat_trans_data (pair_functor F1 F2)
     (pair_functor G1 G2))
 abstract (intro ; intros ; use total2_paths_f ;
                   [ apply (pr2 α) | rewrite transportf_const ; apply (pr2 β) ]
               ).
  Defined.

  
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F1 F2) (pair_functor G1 G2)

  
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F1 F2) (pair_functor G1 G2)

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
pair_functor F1 F2 ⟹ pair_functor G1 G2
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
pair_functor F1 F2 ⟹ pair_functor G1 G2
 exact (pair_nat_trans α β). 
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
is_nat_z_iso (pair_nat_trans α β)

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
is_z_isomorphism (pair_nat_trans α β x)

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⊠ D2 ⟦ pair_functor G1 G2 x, pair_functor F1 F2 x ⟧
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
(λ g : D1 ⊠ D2 ⟦ pair_functor G1 G2 x,
       pair_functor F1 F2 x ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (pair_nat_trans α β x) g) ?pr1

    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⊠ D2 ⟦ pair_functor G1 G2 x, pair_functor F1 F2 x ⟧
 
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⟦ G1 (pr1 x), F1 (pr1 x) ⟧
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D2 ⟦ G2 (pr2 x), F2 (pr2 x) ⟧

      
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D1 ⟦ G1 (pr1 x), F1 (pr1 x) ⟧
 exact (pr1 (pr2 α (pr1 x))).
      
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
D2 ⟦ G2 (pr2 x), F2 (pr2 x) ⟧
 exact (pr1 (pr2 β (pr2 x))).
    
C1, C2, D1, D2: category
F1, G1: C1 ⟶ D1
F2, G2: C2 ⟶ D2
α: nat_z_iso F1 G1
β: nat_z_iso F2 G2
x: C1 ⊠ C2
(λ g : D1 ⊠ D2 ⟦ pair_functor G1 G2 x,
       pair_functor F1 F2 x ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (pair_nat_trans α β x) g)
  (pr1 (pr2 α (pr1 x)) #, pr1 (pr2 β (pr2 x)))
 abstract (
          split ; (use total2_paths_f ;
                   [ apply (pr2 α) | rewrite transportf_const ; apply (pr2 β) ]
                  )
        ).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
⟹ precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
  ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D
⟹ precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
  ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) ?t

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_data
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
 intro ; use catbinprodmor ; apply identity.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
  ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
    (id F
          (pr1
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
    #, id pair_functor F F
            (pr2
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
      ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
      ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
· (id F
        (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
  #, id pair_functor F F
          (pr2
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))) =
(id F (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
#, id pair_functor F F
        (pr2 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
· # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
     ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) f

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
      ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
   · (id F
           (pr1
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
     #, id pair_functor F F
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x')))) =
pr1
  ((id F
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id pair_functor F F
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
        ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) f)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
transportf
  (λ _ : D
         ⟦ pr1
             ((pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
               ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
                x),
         pr1
           ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) x')
         ⟧,
   D ⊠ D
   ⟦ pr2
       ((pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) x),
   pr2
     ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
       ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) x') ⟧) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
      · (id F
              (pr1
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x'))
        #, id pair_functor F F
                (pr2
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x'))))) =
pr2
  ((id F
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id pair_functor F F
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
        ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) f)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
pr1
  (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
      ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
   · (id F
           (pr1
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x'))
     #, id pair_functor F F
             (pr2
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x')))) =
pr1
  ((id F
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id pair_functor F F
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
        ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) f)
 exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
x, x': (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
f: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧
transportf
  (λ _ : D
         ⟦ pr1
             ((pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
               ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
                x),
         pr1
           ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
             ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) x')
         ⟧,
   D ⊠ D
   ⟦ pr2
       ((pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) x),
   pr2
     ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
       ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) x') ⟧)
  (id_right
     (pr1
        (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
            ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f)) @
   ! id_left
       (pr1
          (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
              ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
             f)))
  (pr2
     (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) f
      · (id F
              (pr1
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x'))
        #, id pair_functor F F
                (pr2
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x'))))) =
pr2
  ((id F
         (pr1 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
   #, id pair_functor F F
           (pr2
              (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x)))
   · # (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
        ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) f)
 abstract (rewrite transportf_const ; exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _)).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
      ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
      ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
     ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id F
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id pair_functor F F
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
         ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)))
     ((λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                         D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof C D F x x' f))
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
         ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
         ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
        ((λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
          (id F
                (pr1
                   (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                      C x))
          #, id pair_functor F F
                  (pr2
                     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C
                        C C x))))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
            ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
            ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)))))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
      ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
     (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
      ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
     (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
      (id F
            (pr1
               (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C x))
      #, id pair_functor F F
              (pr2
                 (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                    x))))
     (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
      (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
      total2_paths_f
        (id_right
           (pr1
              (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                  ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D
                      D) f)) @
         ! id_left
             (pr1
                (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                    ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                        D D) f)))
        (unassoc_commutes_subproof C D F x x' f)) c)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) c,
(pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
 ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
(λ g : D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
       ⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
          ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) c,
       (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
        ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (make_nat_trans
      (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
       ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
      (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
       ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
      (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id F
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id pair_functor F F
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                         D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof C D F x x' f)) c)
   g) ?pr1

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
   ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) c,
(pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
 ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧
 use catbinprodmor ; apply identity.
      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
c: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
(λ g : D ⊠ (D ⊠ D)
       ⟦ (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
          ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)) c,
       (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
        ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) c ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (make_nat_trans
      (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
       ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
      (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
       ∙ pair_functor F (pair_functor F F))
      (λ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
       (id F
             (pr1
                (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C C
                   x))
       #, id pair_functor F F
               (pr2
                  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc C C
                     C x))))
      (λ (x x' : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C)
       (f : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
       total2_paths_f
         (id_right
            (pr1
               (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D
                       D D) f)) @
          ! id_left
              (pr1
                 (# (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
                     ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc
                         D D D) f)))
         (unassoc_commutes_subproof C D F x x' f)) c)
   g)
  (id pr11 (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F c)
  #, id (pr21 (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F c),,
         pr2 (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F c)))
 abstract (split ; (use total2_paths_f ; [ apply id_right | rewrite transportf_const ; apply id_right ])).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F ∙ assoc_right TD)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ F)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F ∙ assoc_right TD)
  (assoc_right TC ∙ F)

    (* This commuting diagram can be split in 3 commuting diagrams stacked together *)
    (* Step 1: The top commuting diagram is unassoc_commutes *)
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F

(C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ D

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F ∙ assoc_right TD)
  ?G
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso ?G (assoc_right TC ∙ F)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  ((pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
    ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D)
   ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  (assoc_right TC ∙ F)

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C

nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ precategory_binproduct_unassoc D D D) 
  ?G2

      2: apply unassoc_commutes.

  (assoc_right TC ∙ F)

   ∙ (pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD ∙ TD))
  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC ∙ TC) ∙ F)


    (* Step 2: The lowest commuting diagram is the tensor preserving commuting one *)

      apply (FF ,, FF_iso).

   ∙ functor_tensor_map_dom TD F)

  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC
    ∙ pair_functor F F) ∙ TD)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  ((pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)
    ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD) ∙ TD)
  ((pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC
    ∙ pair_functor F F) ∙ TD)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor F (pair_functor F F)
   ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity D) TD)
  (pair_functor (functor_identity C) TC
   ∙ pair_functor F F)


    (* Step 3: The middle commuting square is the tensor preserving commuting one
               but tensored with the identity functor on the left *)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso (F ∙ functor_identity D)
  (functor_identity C ∙ F)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F F ∙ TD) (TC ∙ F)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso (F ∙ functor_identity D)
  (functor_identity C ∙ F)
 apply (make_nat_z_iso _ _ _ (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id F)). 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F F ∙ TD) (TC ∙ F)

    apply (FF ,, FF_iso).
  Defined.

  
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2)
  (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2))

  
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
nat_z_iso (pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2)
  (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2))

    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2
⟹ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2
⟹ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)
 apply nat_trans_id. 
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
is_nat_z_iso
  (nat_trans_id (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)))

    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
c: C1 ⊠ D1
is_z_isomorphism
  (nat_trans_id (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)) c)

    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
c: C1 ⊠ D1
C3 ⊠ D3 ⟦ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2) c,
(pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2) c ⟧
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
c: C1 ⊠ D1
(λ g : C3 ⊠ D3 ⟦ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2) c,
       (pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2) c ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (nat_trans_id (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)) c)
   g) ?pr1

    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
c: C1 ⊠ D1
C3 ⊠ D3 ⟦ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2) c,
(pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2) c ⟧
 use catbinprodmor ; apply identity.
    
C1, C2, C3, D1, D2, D3: category
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
G1: D1 ⟶ D2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
G2: D2 ⟶ D3
c: C1 ⊠ D1
(λ g : C3 ⊠ D3 ⟦ pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2) c,
       (pair_functor F1 G1 ∙ pair_functor F2 G2) c ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (nat_trans_id (pair_functor (F1 ∙ F2) (G1 ∙ G2)) c)
   g)
  (id F2 (pr1 (pair_functor F1 G1 c))
  #, id G2 (pr2 (pair_functor F1 G1 c)))
 split ; apply id_right.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ F)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F ∙ assoc_left TD)
  (assoc_left TC ∙ F)

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
   ∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD))
  ((pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ TC) ∙ F)

TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

   ∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD))

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso ?G
  ((pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ TC) ∙ F)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C)
   ∙ (pair_functor F F ∙ TD))
  ((pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ TC) ∙ F)

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
(C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ D

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C)
   ∙ (pair_functor F F ∙ TD)) 
  ?G

F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
is_nat_z_iso FF

        apply FF_iso.
      }
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensor TC TD F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso FF
nat_z_iso
  (pair_functor TC (functor_identity C)
   ∙ functor_tensor_map_codom TC F)
  ((pair_functor TC (functor_identity C) ∙ TC) ∙ F)

    apply nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc.
  Defined.

  Context {C D : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D}
          {IC : C} {ID : D}.

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).


  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD)
⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pair_functor (pair_functor F F) F
∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD)
⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F


    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pair_functor pF F
∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD)
⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
pFF ∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD)
⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F


    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
functor_data ((C ⊠ C) ⊠ C) D
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
pFF ∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD) ⟹ ?G
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
?G ⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
pFF ∙ (pair_functor TD (functor_identity D) ∙ TD) ⟹ ?G
 exact (pre_whisker pFF αD). 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
functor_composite_data pFF (assoc_right TD)
⟹ assoc_right TC ∙ F

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
functor_tensor TC TD F
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
is_nat_z_iso ?FF

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
pF:= pair_functor F F: C ⊠ C ⟶ D ⊠ D
pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
functor_tensor TC TD F
 exact (pr1 FF).

pFF:= pair_functor pF F: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ (D ⊠ D) ⊠ D
is_nat_z_iso (pr1 FF)
 exact FF_iso.
  Defined.

⟹ functor_composite_data (assoc_left TC) F

TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
