C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
is_nat_z_iso (pr1 FF)
 exact FF_iso.
  Defined.

  Definition functor_nat_trans_preserves
             (αC : associator TC) (αD : associator TD)
             {F : functor C D}
             {FF : functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F}
             (FF_iso : is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF))
    : UU := functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso = functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
has_homsets D
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso x =
functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso x

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
has_homsets D
 apply homset_property. 
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
∏ x : (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C,
functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso x =
functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso x

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso x =
functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso x

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso x =
functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso x

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
id ((F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
· (# (pr1 TD)
     (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x), F (pr2 x)))
   · (# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (pr1 x) #, id F (pr2 x))
      · (# (pr1 TD)
           (id F (TC (pr1 x)) #, id F (pr2 x))
         · (# (pr1 TD)
              (id F (TC (pr1 x)) #, id F (pr2 x))
            · (id (F (TC (pr1 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
               · ((pr11 FF) (TC (pr1 x), pr2 x)
                  · id F (TC (pr1 x) ⊗_C pr2 x)))))))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D TD (F (pr21 x),, F (pr2 x)))
   · (# TD
        (id F (pr11 x)
        #, # TD (id (F (pr21 x), F (pr2 x))))
      · (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
         · (id (F (pr11 x)
                ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
            · # (pr1 TD)
                (id F (pr11 x)
                #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id (F (pr11 x)
                  ⊗_D F (TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))
            · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))))))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
id ((F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
· # (pr1 TD)
    (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x), F (pr2 x)))
· (# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (pr1 x) #, id F (pr2 x))
   · (# (pr1 TD) (id F (TC (pr1 x)) #, id F (pr2 x))
      · (# (pr1 TD)
           (id F (TC (pr1 x)) #, id F (pr2 x))
         · (id (F (TC (pr1 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
            · ((pr11 FF) (TC (pr1 x), pr2 x)
               · id F (TC (pr1 x) ⊗_C pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D TD (F (pr21 x),, F (pr2 x)))
   · (# TD
        (id F (pr11 x)
        #, # TD (id (F (pr21 x), F (pr2 x))))
      · (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
         · (id (F (pr11 x)
                ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
            · # (pr1 TD)
                (id F (pr11 x)
                #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id (F (pr11 x)
                  ⊗_D F (TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))
            · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))))))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
id ((F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
· id ((F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (pr21 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
· (# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (pr1 x) #, id F (pr2 x))
   · (id (F (TC (pr1 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
      · (id (F (TC (pr1 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
         · (id (F (TC (pr1 x)) ⊗_D F (pr2 x))
            · ((pr11 FF) (TC (pr1 x), pr2 x)
               · id F (TC (pr1 x) ⊗_C pr2 x))))))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D TD (F (pr21 x),, F (pr2 x)))
   · (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
      · (id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
         · (id (F (pr11 x)
                ⊗_D (F (pr21 x) ⊗_D F (pr2 x)))
            · # (pr1 TD)
                (id F (pr11 x)
                #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id (F (pr11 x)
                  ⊗_D F (TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))
            · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
            · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))))))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (pr1 x) #, id F (pr2 x))
· ((pr11 FF) (TC (pr1 x), pr2 x)
   · id F (TC (pr1 x) ⊗_C pr2 x))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (# (pr1 TD)
     (id F (pr11 x) #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
   · id (F (pr11 x) ⊗_D F (TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))
   · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
   · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
   · id F (pr11 x ⊗_C TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (pr1 x) #, id F (pr2 x))
· (pr11 FF) (TC (pr1 x), pr2 x) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (# (pr1 TD)
     (id F (pr11 x) #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
   · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)
x: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C
p:= FFF (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x): # TD
  ((pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x)
  #, id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x ⊗_C pr21 x, pr2 x)
· # (pr11 (F,, FF)) (αC ((pr11 x, pr21 x), pr2 x)) =
αD
  (((pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x),
   (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x)),
  (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id (pr11 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x)
    #, (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr112 (F,, FF)) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x)
αD ((pr1 F (pr11 x), pr1 F (pr21 x)), pr1 F (pr2 x))
· # TD
    (id pr1 F (pr11 x) #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x, pr2 x))
· (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, pr21 x ⊗_C pr2 x) =
pr1 αD ((F (pr11 x), F (pr21 x)), F (pr2 x))
· (# (pr1 TD)
     (id F (pr11 x) #, (pr11 FF) (pr21 x,, pr2 x))
   · (pr11 FF) (pr11 x, TC (pr21 x,, pr2 x)))

    apply assoc'.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)

  
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
functor_ass_disp_cat αC αD (F,, FF)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t:= eqtohomot
  (base_paths (functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso)
     (functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso) FFF)
  ((x, y), z): pr1 (functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso) ((x, y), z) =
pr1 (functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso) ((x, y), z)
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t:= eqtohomot
  (base_paths (functor_ass_ntrans2 αC αD FF_iso)
     (functor_ass_ntrans1 αC αD FF_iso) FFF)
  ((x, y), z): id ((F x ⊗_D F y) ⊗_D F z)
· (# (pr1 TD) (id (F x ⊗_D F y, F z))
   · (# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (x, y) #, id F z)
      · (# (pr1 TD) (id F (x ⊗_C y) #, id F z)
         · (# (pr1 TD) (id F (x ⊗_C y) #, id F z)
            · (id (F (x ⊗_C y) ⊗_D F z)
               · ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
                  · id F ((x ⊗_C y) ⊗_C z)))))))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (id (F x ⊗_D TD (F y,, F z))
   · (# TD (id F x #, # TD (id (F y, F z)))
      · (id (F x ⊗_D (F y ⊗_D F z))
         · (id (F x ⊗_D (F y ⊗_D F z))
            · # (pr1 TD)
                (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
            · id (F x ⊗_D F (TC (y,, z)))
            · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z))
            · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z))
            · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z))))))
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t: id ((F x ⊗_D F y) ⊗_D F z)
· (id ((F x ⊗_D F y) ⊗_D F z)
   · (# (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (x, y) #, id F z)
      · (id (F (x ⊗_C y) ⊗_D F z)
         · (id (F (x ⊗_C y) ⊗_D F z)
            · (id (F (x ⊗_C y) ⊗_D F z)
               · ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
                  · id F ((x ⊗_C y) ⊗_C z)))))))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (id (F x ⊗_D TD (F y,, F z))
   · (id (F x ⊗_D (F y ⊗_D F z))
      · (id (F x ⊗_D (F y ⊗_D F z))
         · (id (F x ⊗_D (F y ⊗_D F z))
            · # (pr1 TD)
                (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
            · id (F x ⊗_D F (TC (y,, z)))
            · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z))
            · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z))
            · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z))))))
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t: # (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (x, y) #, id F z)
· ((pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · id F ((x ⊗_C y) ⊗_C z))
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (# (pr1 TD) (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
   · id (F x ⊗_D F (TC (y,, z)))
   · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z))
   · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z))
   · id F (x ⊗_C TC (y,, z)))
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t: # (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (x, y) #, id F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (# (pr1 TD) (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
   · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z)))
# TD ((pr11 FF) (x, y) #, id pr1 F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z) · # (pr1 F) (αC ((x, y), z)) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    
C, D: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
IC: C
ID: D
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
F: C ⟶ D
FF: functor_tensorunit_disp_cat TC TD IC ID F
FF_iso: is_nat_z_iso (pr11 FF)
FFF: functor_nat_trans_preserves αC αD FF_iso
x, y, z: C
t: # (pr1 TD) (pr1 FF (x, y) #, id F z)
· (pr11 FF) (x ⊗_C y, z)
· # (pr1 F) (pr1 αC ((x, y), z)) =
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (# (pr1 TD) (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
   · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z)))
pr1 αD ((F x, F y), F z)
· (# (pr1 TD) (id F x #, (pr11 FF) (y,, z))
   · (pr11 FF) (x, TC (y,, z))) =
αD ((pr1 F x, pr1 F y), pr1 F z)
· # TD (id pr1 F x #, (pr11 FF) (y, z))
· (pr11 FF) (x, y ⊗_C z)

    apply assoc.
  Qed.

End AssociatorMonoidalProperty.

Section StrongMonoidalProperty.

  Context {C D E : category}
          {TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C} {TD : functor (D ⊠ D) D} {TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E}
          {IC : C} {ID : D} {IE : E}
          {luC : left_unitor TC IC} {luD : left_unitor TD ID} {luE : left_unitor TE IE}
          {ruC : right_unitor TC IC} {ruD : right_unitor TD ID} {ruE : right_unitor TE IE}
          {αC : associator TC} {αD : associator TD} {αE : associator TE}.

  Notation "X ⊗_C Y" := (TC (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_C g" := (# TC (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_D Y" := (TD (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_D g" := (# TD (f #, g)) (at level 31).
  Notation "X ⊗_E Y" := (TE (X , Y)) (at level 31).
  Notation "f #⊗_E g" := (# TE (f #, g)) (at level 31).

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luE ruC ruE αC αE
  ((pr11 F ∙ pr11 G,,
    functor_tensorunit_composition (pr21 F) (pr21 G)),,
   functor_monoidal_composition (pr2 F) (pr2 G))

  
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luE ruC ruE αC αE
  ((pr11 F ∙ pr11 G,,
    functor_tensorunit_composition (pr21 F) (pr21 G)),,
   functor_monoidal_composition (pr2 F) (pr2 G))

    
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr121 ((pr11 F ∙ pr11 G,,
           functor_tensorunit_composition (pr21 F)
             (pr21 G)),,
          functor_monoidal_composition (pr2 F) (pr2 G)))
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr221 ((pr11 F ∙ pr11 G,,
           functor_tensorunit_composition (pr21 F)
             (pr21 G)),,
          functor_monoidal_composition (pr2 F) (pr2 G)))

is_z_isomorphism

is_z_isomorphism

C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

ID: D

luE: left_unitor TE IE

ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE

  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
cc: C ⊠ C
is_z_isomorphism
  ((pr121 G) ((pr11 F) (pr1 cc), (pr11 F) (pr2 cc)))

      exact (pr1 GG  ((pr111 F) (pr1 cc), (pr111 F) (pr2 cc))).

C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
is_z_isomorphism (pr221 G)
 exact (pr2 GG).
      
C, D, E: category
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TD: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IC: C
ID: D
IE: E
luC: left_unitor TC IC
luD: left_unitor TD ID
luE: left_unitor TE IE
ruC: right_unitor TC IC
ruD: right_unitor TD ID
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
αC: associator TC
αD: associator TD
αE: associator TE
F: functor_monoidal_cat luC luD ruC ruD αC αD
G: functor_monoidal_cat luD luE ruD ruE αD αE
FF: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luC luD ruC ruD
  αC αD F
GG: functor_strong_monoidal_disp_cat luD luE ruD ruE
  αD αE G
is_z_isomorphism (# (pr11 G) (pr221 F))
 exact (pr2 (functor_on_z_iso (pr11 G) (make_z_iso' _ (pr2 FF)))).
  Defined.

End StrongMonoidalProperty.
